content.caption: The completed branch, a confident, customer-forward banking environment designed to build trust on entry.

content.heading: The Brief
content.body: Finance Trust Bank required a full interior fit-out for their branch premises, a client-facing space that needed to communicate institutional credibility while remaining approachable and accessible to a broad customer base. The brief called for a clean, contemporary banking environment with clear spatial hierarchy between public service zones, teller counters, and private consultation areas.

content.alt: Finance Trust Bank branch entrance and reception
content.caption: The public entrance, branded signage, polished surfaces, and a welcoming reception desk anchor the customer journey from arrival.

content.heading: Approach
content.body:
Our design strategy focused on translating Finance Trust Bank's brand values, reliability, accessibility, and professionalism, into a coherent spatial language. A warm neutral palette of off-white panelling, timber-toned counters, and the bank's corporate accent colour anchors the identity throughout without relying on heavy branding. Ceiling coffers with integrated LED cove lighting define each functional zone, while full-height glazed partitions keep the floor plan open and legible for first-time visitors.

The teller line was designed to reduce perceived queuing stress, individual service bays with low-profile screens offer privacy without creating a barrier between staff and customers. A dedicated waiting area with upholstered seating and a digital queue-management display completes the service sequence.

items.caption: The teller counter, individual service bays with fluted panel fronts and integrated privacy screens.
The customer waiting zone, upholstered seating, a digital queue display, and branded feature wall behind.

content.caption: A private consultation room, glazed partition walls, acoustic panels, and bespoke joinery for client-facing advisory sessions.

items.caption: The branch manager's office, integrated storage, clean desk layout, and brand-consistent finishes throughout.
The back-of-house operational zone, workstations, cable-managed desks, and acoustic ceiling treatment.

content.caption: Material palette detail, timber-toned surfaces, polished composite flooring, and the bank's signature accent colour applied as a feature band at counter height.

content.heading: Outcome
content.body: The completed branch delivers a banking environment that performs across every customer touchpoint, from the moment of arrival through teller service to private advisory meetings. Finance Trust Bank now occupies a space that communicates the scale and stability of the institution while keeping the customer experience at the centre of every design decision. The fit-out has been noted internally as a template for future branch refurbishments.
